title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・さいこーっしょ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And they're into the stretch! Who's that coming
up on the outside?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow... Wait, is that Tosen Jordan?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: No way! How did she...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan takes the lead! Tosen Jordan
charges forward!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Jordan! Wow... just, wow!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's it, come on!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Tosen Jordan is holding on! She's still in the lead!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You can do it! You've got this! Go, go, go!

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text:
Ruuun!
Get it, Jordaaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Tosen Jordan does it! First place goes to
Tosen Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: What the... No way...

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text: Are you serious? Who could've seen this coming...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Haha... Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh... Trainer?! What?! Don't do that!
choice_data_list:
You were stupidly spectacular! It was like a
dream!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Dummy.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Why are you acting all surprised? This was your
own doing, you know.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You made this speed... You trained the greatest Umamusume ever.

text_block_list.name: Spectator E
text_block_list.text:
That was unbelieeevable! Tosen Jordan! You
nailed it!

text_block_list.name: Spectator F
text_block_list.text:
You were so fast! I got it all on video! I mean,
wow! You're gonna be on the front page of every
paper tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Haha... Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
More! More! I can't hear you! Pour that praise on
me!

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: You're so cool, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Haha... This is the best. I've never been so...
hyped!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer, come here. You gotta take it all in.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Feels incredible, doesn't it? They're all cheering
for us.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, you got your phone on you?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Good, lemme see it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Okay, stand right there. No moving.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna upload this to UmaTok later, so you
better answer my questions, okay?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Ahem.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan points the phone camera in my
direction.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So, Trainer, today your trainee won the autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: How do you feel?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Yeah, no kidding.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: And? What else?
choice_data_list: My trainee is the greatest ever!
My trainee is the greatest ever!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah, that's better. And also...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I have the best trainer ever! ...There!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she stands in the winner's circle, Tosen Jordan
beams with a smile like the sun itself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt in anyone's minds what the top
news story will be tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's how remarkable Tosen Jordan's
performance was.
